description: This email template is perfect for International Women's Day on March 8th, highlighting and celebrating the achievements of female business owners, particularly those in agriculture and horticulture. It's designed to empower women in these industries, from florists to farmers, placing them in the spotlight. The template also includes an announcement feature for any special events or fundraising initiatives supporting these women. It's a seasonal promotion tactic that fits well within the realms of service promotion, home goods, and global observances & celebrations. Use this template to show your support for women entrepreneurs and help their businesses flourish.
short_description: Celebrate female entrepreneurship this International Women's Day with our email template. Ideal for promoting women in agriculture, horticulture, and home goods industries. Perfect for seasonal promotions, fundraising, and spotlighting women business owners. Empower and support women's ventures today.

designer.description: Hi, I'm Betina, a digital designer currently working across emails, digital campaigns and social media.
